---
title: "AK-OOe-Pensionen-PN-23011"
author: "Lukas Schmoigl / Stefan Weingärtner"
execute: 
  echo: false
---


## R

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(kableExtra)
options(scipen = 999999)

path <- "//int.wsr.at/Nabu/ext_Projekte/AK-OOe-Pensionen_PN-23011/"
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
data <- read_csv("data/scenarios.csv")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
data |> 
  filter(row_number()<20) |>
  kable("html")
```


## JavaScript

{{< include src/config.qmd >}}

```{ojs}
// echo: false
// warning: false
import {vl} from "@vega/vega-lite-api-v5"
import {aq, op} from '@uwdata/arquero'
```

```{ojs}
// echo: false
// warning: false
data = FileAttachment("data/scenarios.csv").csv({ typed: true })
```

```{ojs}
// echo: false
// warning: false
data
```
